panels.description: 最近90天内电量≥95%时的平均推算满电续航

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(
  CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
  ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
)::numeric, 0) AS current_range
FROM charges c
JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND c.battery_level >= 95
  AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND c.date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days';

panels.description: 根据最早20次近满电充电记录自动推算出厂续航基准

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(
  CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN t.ideal_battery_range_km
  ELSE t.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / t.battery_level
)::numeric, 0) AS initial_range
FROM (
  SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km, c.ideal_battery_range_km, c.battery_level
  FROM charges c
  JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND c.battery_level >= 95
    AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY c.date ASC
  LIMIT 20
) t;

panels.description: 初始续航 − 当前续航

targets.rawSql:
WITH initial AS (
  SELECT ROUND(AVG(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN t.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE t.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / t.battery_level
  )::numeric, 0) AS v
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km, c.ideal_battery_range_km, c.battery_level
    FROM charges c
    JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND c.battery_level >= 95
      AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY c.date ASC LIMIT 20
  ) t
),
current AS (
  SELECT ROUND(AVG(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
  )::numeric, 0) AS v
  FROM charges c
  JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND c.battery_level >= 95
    AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND c.date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
)
SELECT GREATEST(i.v - c.v, 0) AS degraded_km
FROM initial i, current c;

panels.description: 已退化续航 ÷ 初始续航 × 100%。绿色<5% 正常，黄色5-10% 轻微，橙色10-15% 明显，红色>15% 需关注

targets.rawSql:
WITH initial AS (
  SELECT AVG(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN t.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE t.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / t.battery_level
  ) AS v
  FROM (
    SELECT c.rated_battery_range_km, c.ideal_battery_range_km, c.battery_level
    FROM charges c
    JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
    WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND c.battery_level >= 95
      AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY c.date ASC LIMIT 20
  ) t
),
current AS (
  SELECT AVG(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
  ) AS v
  FROM charges c
  JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id AND c.battery_level >= 95
    AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
    AND c.date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
)
SELECT ROUND(GREATEST((1 - c.v / NULLIF(i.v, 0)) * 100, 0)::numeric, 1) AS degradation_pct
FROM initial i, current c;

panels.description: 每周采样一次，取电量≥95%时的推算满电续航均值。数据点越密集说明近满电充电越频繁
panels.title: 满电续航退化趋势（按周）

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', c.date) AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
  )::numeric, 0) AS "满电续航(km)"
FROM charges c
JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND c.battery_level >= 95
  AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: 每月平均满电续航，趋势向下说明电池在退化
panels.title: 每月平均满电续航(km)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', c.date) AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
  )::numeric, 0) AS "月均满电续航(km)"
FROM charges c
JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND c.battery_level >= 95
  AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: 数据质量指标：采样次数越多，退化趋势越准确
panels.title: 数据质量

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS "近满电采样次数",
  MAX(c.battery_level) AS "最高电量(%)",
  ROUND(MAX(
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
  )::numeric, 0) AS "最高续航(km)"
FROM charges c
JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND c.battery_level >= 95
  AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL;

panels.description: 每个点代表一次电量≥95%的充电记录推算出的满电续航。点越分散说明数据噪声越大（受温度、SOC校准影响）
panels.title: 近满电充电续航散点（原始数据）

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  c.date AS time,
  ROUND((
    CASE WHEN '$preferred_range' = 'ideal' THEN c.ideal_battery_range_km
    ELSE c.rated_battery_range_km END * 100.0 / c.battery_level
  )::numeric, 0) AS "推算满电续航(km)"
FROM charges c
JOIN charging_processes cp ON cp.id = c.charging_process_id
WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
  AND c.battery_level >= 95
  AND c.rated_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
  AND c.ideal_battery_range_km IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.date;

list.definition:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;
list.label: 车辆
list.name: car_id
list.query:
SELECT
    id as __value,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text 
FROM cars
ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;
